title: OptimizedPvP
description: An ultra-optimized PvP modpack for Netherite, Pot, Sword, and Crystal PvP, featuring FPS boosts and all essential mods for competitive combat — smooth, lag-free, and performance-focused gameplay.
body:
OptimizedPvP is a fully performance-optimized PvP modpack designed for competitive players who want maximum FPS, zero lag, and smooth combat.

Every mod in this pack is carefully selected to provide all essential tools for Netherite, Sword, Crystal, and Pot PvP, while keeping the pack lightweight and stable. Whether you play on low-end PCs or want a pure competitive edge, this modpack gives you fast, responsive, and distraction-free PvP gameplay.

**⚔️ Key Features**

🚀 Ultra-high FPS for smooth gameplay

⚡ Optimized for PvP: Netherite, Sword, Crystal, Pot fights

🧠 Includes all essential PvP mods

🎯 Clean UI designed for competitive combat

❌ No unnecessary mods or distractions

✅ Lightweight, stable, and server-friendly

**💻 Recommended For**

Sword PvP & Crystal PvP

Competitive SMP servers

Low-end to mid-range PCs

Players who want pure PvP with maximum performance
****
**🔥 Tagline**

Pure PvP. Maximum FPS.

Optimized for Combat. Built for Speed.

No Lag. Just PvP.
